sections.paragraph:
ἐμπερίτομος, ον (s. περιτέμνω) circumcised B 9:6 v.l. (found elsewh. only in Ps.-Clem., Hom. p. 4, 22 Lag., and Philostorg., HE 3, 4).

B B = Barnabas (the Letter of), II a.d., except in series of uncial witnesses, in which case B refers to Codex Vaticanus (s. also Vat.). When the abbrv. B would ambiguous, Vat. is used for the codex.—List 1

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Ps. Ps. = pseudo, pseudonymous

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 323
